name: Bob (personal)
subject: thanks for sharing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6339/51dbcc2a/1e86e10c/3a809da/3796808289/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Team --

I've spent a lot of time traveling across this great Commonwealth, meeting Pennsylvanians who want to share their stories, their hopes and their fears with me. And I work every day to try and make the future better for all Pennsylvanians.

I've met middle-class families and senior citizens who almost always bring up their greatest fear: losing Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security. I know how important these programs are for so many people who depend on them to pay for their care or whose jobs exist because of the stability we've always given these programs, and I will keep fighting with two fists up to protect them.

As a father, I understand the concerns that parents bring to me about their children's futures. I've spoken to parents who worry that their kids will drown in debt from student loans or that our K-12 schools don't have the resources to give our youngest students the education they deserve. I hope that every parent, student and educator in Pennsylvania knows that I'm in their corner, standing up against the forces cruelly trying to weaken the education system.

I've heard from constituents who worry that they will go bankrupt in order to make sure their loved ones have adequate health care. They worry every time repealing the Affordable Care Act comes up for a vote or the Trump administration threatens protections for people with existing conditions because it would take away vital health care coverage for them and their loved ones. I won't let that happen -- we have work to do on access to quality, affordable health care, but we cannot move backward.

The truth is that these fears resonate with a lot of Americans. We need to support our neighbors who are just trying to put a roof over their loved ones' heads and give them their best possible chance at a bright future, and I think that's something we can all agree on, regardless of party.

So today I want to say thanks to all of those Pennsylvanians who have taken time out of their busy lives to meet me and share your stories, and thanks to you, team, for helping me fight for Pennsylvanians every day in the Senate. There are 68 days -- just over two months and just under ten weeks -- between now and Election Day, and I'm not slowing down, because there is far too much at stake.

On to November,

Bob [DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180830_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180830_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---

Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.
---
PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102

Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.

If that is not your preferred email address, you can update your information [here.](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6339/51dbcc2a/1e86e10c/3a809e4/3796808289/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/s/update-your-contact-information?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") We believe emails are an important way to stay in contact with supporters, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6339/51dbcc2a/1e86e10c/3a809e5/3796808289/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/s/update-your-preferences?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Bob Casey for Senate appreciates any feedback you might have. [Click here](mailto:info@bobcasey.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact Bob Casey for Senate with any questions, concerns, or ideas. Want to stay updated on the campaign through social media? You can like Bob Casey for Senate on [Facebook](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6339/51dbcc2a/1e86e10c/3a809e6/3796808289/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/BobCaseyJr/") or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6339/51dbcc2a/1e86e10c/3a809e7/3796808289/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/Bob_Casey") or [Instagram](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6339/51dbcc2a/1e86e10c/3a809e0/3796808289/VEsO/ "https://www.instagram.com/bobcaseyjr/"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6339/51dbcc2a/1e86e10c/3a809e1/3796808289/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") from Bob Casey for Senate emails.

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: Tom will fight for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
I've spent a lot of my time in Congress focusing on health care. My friend and colleague Tom O'Halleran has fought to spotlight this core American issue.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633fbb/1a8421e1/1a548e42f/48e6d788/2459145841/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Friend, _I 've spent a lot of my time in Congress focusing on health care._ Our system is flawed -- prices are too high, and access is still too limited -- but I've worked with some incredible colleagues to fight back against attempts to cut coverage. We've made health care access a central issue in the midterm elections this year, too. **My friend and colleague Tom O 'Halleran has fought to spotlight this core American issue, **advocating loudly and tirelessly for improving rural hospitals, mental health services, and care for our veterans. Friend, I'm writing you today because Tom faces a tough re-election fight, and he needs [**our support**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.30_b2_jkiii_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") so he can continue addressing our priorities in Congress. [**Can you make a donation to his campaign today, ahead of his next fundraising deadline tomorrow? **](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.30_b2_jkiii_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Currently, it might seem like our government is too divided and dysfunctional to make progress on these critical issues. But we can't give up. To expand access to affordable health care in this country, we need more people like Tom serving in Congress. He is an independent voice who cares, above all, about improving life for his constituents -- and he will work with anyone, regardless of party, to make it happen. With [**our support**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.30_b2_jkiii_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer="), Tom will keep fighting to improve our health care system and make life better for every Arizonan. [**Please consider supporting his re-election campaign today.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.30_b2_jkiii_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you, Joe Kennedy III

| ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.30_b2_jkiii_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **
** **
** **
** **

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633fbb/1a8421e1/1a548e42f/48e6d78c/2459145841/VEsP/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/less-emails").

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonans. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633fbb/1a8421e1/1a548e42f/48e6d78d/2459145841/VEsHBQ/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe").

subject: Trump Labor Department Boosts Apprenticeship Push with New Website
body:
| |
---
#
# _Trump Labor Department Boosts Apprenticeship Push with New Website_
“Trump's administration has aggressively promoted apprenticeships as an alternative to higher education, arguing there is a strong demand for skilled workers not currently being met and that they provide good-paying careers without having to incur the debt typically entailed by higher education,” Sean Higgins reports for _Washington Examiner._ Yesterday, the Labor Department unveiled a new website to promote such opportunities, [**apprenticeship.gov**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODMxLjk0MzIwMTIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgzMS45NDMyMDEyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgwNjQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&http://www.apprenticeship.gov/)—a one-stop resource for Americans looking to pursue one of these programs. [**Click here to read more.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODMxLjk0MzIwMTIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgzMS45NDMyMDEyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgwNjQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/policy/economy/trump-labor-department-boosts-apprenticeship-push-with-new-website) “The Trump administration’s continued attention to economic matters – despite the liberal media’s daily efforts to get him and his team off-balance through dishonest reporting and smear stories – is paying off,” former Speaker of the House Newt Gingrich writes in [**Fox News**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODMxLjk0MzIwMTIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgzMS45NDMyMDEyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgwNjQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&http://www.foxnews.com/opinion/2018/08/30/newt-gingrich-trump-keeps-racking-up-victories-despite-liberal-medias-desperate-efforts.html). “The average American sees the economy getting better and better. And the average American increasingly thinks the success is due to President Trump.” In an exclusive interview with [**RFD-TV**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODMxLjk0MzIwMTIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgzMS45NDMyMDEyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgwNjQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&http://www.rfdtv.com/story/38981245/president-trump-asks-farmers-to-hang-in-there#.W4jFhOhKg2w), President Trump “addressed the many pressing issues currently facing farmers, ranchers and all Rural Americans,” Abe Goolsby writes. “A Mexico deal is signed, and it’s going to open up Mexico even more,” the President said. “It’ll be far better than NAFTA.” “Judge Brett Kavanaugh is legal scholar, a judge who respects and adheres to the Constitution, and a good man. I think he’s the type of person we need serving on the Supreme Court of the United States dealing with the tough issues the court will address that affect Ohioans and Americans everywhere,” Sen. Rob Portman (R-OH) writes in the **_[Clermont Sun](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODMxLjk0MzIwMTIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgzMS45NDMyMDEyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgwNjQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.clermontsun.com/2018/08/30/sen-rob-portman-brett-kavanaugh-is-the-right-pick-for-justice-of-the-supreme-court/)._** “More than 100 students, alumni, and faculty at Yale College have endorsed Brett Kavanaugh for the Supreme Court, lauding President Trump’s nominee as a ‘distinguished jurist’ with ‘deep conviction and integrity,’” Melissa Quinn reports in the [**_Washington Examiner_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODMxLjk0MzIwMTIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgzMS45NDMyMDEyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgwNjQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/policy/courts/yale-students-alumni-faculty-back-brett-kavanaugh-for-supreme-court). “The members of the Yale community cited Kavanaugh’s involvement with his alma mater and the community in the D.C. area where he lives.”
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODMxLjk0MzIwMTIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgzMS45NDMyMDEyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgwNjQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODMxLjk0MzIwMTIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgzMS45NDMyMDEyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgwNjQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODMxLjk0MzIwMTIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgzMS45NDMyMDEyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgwNjQ2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&108&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

name: Mel Hall
subject: I don’t mind hard work, and I know you don’t either
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friends,

The end of the month means we have single-digit weeks left in our campaign--9 more weeks that will determine if we are able to flip this seat and send new Hoosier leadership to Washington.

It's crunch time, and if we're going to be successful, we need the resources to stay up on the airwaves, and to bring our message to voters.

**[Chip in $5 before midnight to keep our ads on the air, so people can learn about the Hoosier values I'll bring to Washington D.C.](https://act.myngp.com/el/WlQyKUOAT2iJps_WQw7sl2Eg_Rqy4DOZjkpU5cc-cmk=/L4ev0mSmKTMDYOWXcktISGlnfFYJVG7iObVNHDvj1fs=?refcode=em180831)**

I know we talk to you often about our ads. It isn't just because I'm proud of my background as a father, minister, and business leader (but I am). And it isn't just because I'm proud of my plan to bring transparency and accountability to Washington (but I am).

It's because my campaign isn't funded by lobbyists or corporate PACs writing blank checks, like our current representative. I chose not to take corporate PAC or lobbyist contributions because I don't want to be beholden to anyone but the people I aim to serve in Indiana.

But that also means I need to work a little harder to get my message out, and to keep it up through Election Day. I was born on a farm. I don't mind a bit of hard work, and I know you don't either.

**So let 's work together to flip this seat in November. Contribute before the month ends at midnight so we can keep our ads on the air and flip this seat.**

_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/WlQyKUOAT2iJps_WQw7sl2Eg_Rqy4DOZjkpU5cc-cmk=/L4ev0mSmKTMDYOWXcktISGlnfFYJVG7iObVNHDvj1fs=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em180831)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/WlQyKUOAT2iJps_WQw7sl2Eg_Rqy4DOZjkpU5cc-cmk=/L4ev0mSmKTMDYOWXcktISGlnfFYJVG7iObVNHDvj1fs=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em180831)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/WlQyKUOAT2iJps_WQw7sl2Eg_Rqy4DOZjkpU5cc-cmk=/L4ev0mSmKTMDYOWXcktISGlnfFYJVG7iObVNHDvj1fs=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em180831)
[Express Donate: $200](https://act.myngp.com/el/WlQyKUOAT2iJps_WQw7sl2Eg_Rqy4DOZjkpU5cc-cmk=/L4ev0mSmKTMDYOWXcktISGlnfFYJVG7iObVNHDvj1fs=?express_lane=true&amount=200&refcode=em180831)
[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/WlQyKUOAT2iJps_WQw7sl2Eg_Rqy4DOZjkpU5cc-cmk=/L4ev0mSmKTMDYOWXcktISGlnfFYJVG7iObVNHDvj1fs=?refcode=em180831)

Thank you,

Mel Hall

Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
---
Mel Hall for Congress
P.O. Box 862
South Bend, IN 46624 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/WlQyKUOAT2iJps_WQw7sl2Eg_Rqy4DOZjkpU5cc-cmk=/HyGQdDAgLHxWhhn6y0RkSs-lhbAff677P7c9uHGRjY0=).

name: gina.raimondo
subject: FWD: midnight deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
Hi friend,
I just wanted to make sure you saw Kate's email. **We are still _$4,225 short_ of our August fundraising goal, and were hoping you might be able to help us get over the top.**
**[Can you click here now to contribute $17 or as much as you can before midnight tonight??](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a018/5e076a9e/541c7ee8/14425b62/3990689818/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raimondo?refcode=180831")**
Enjoy the holiday weekend.
Gina
Sent from my iPhone
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Kate Ramstad (kr@ginaraimondo.com)
Date: 8/30/18, 6:50AM
Subject: need your help
Hi friend,
**The FINAL end-of-month deadline before the Democratic primary election is TOMORROW!!!** Gina is committed to Rhode Island and its comeback, but she is still _$7,372 short_ of her August fundraising goal and won't be able to reach it without you.
**In the last four years, Governor Raimondo has brought real change to Rhode Island.** Schools, roads, and bridges are being fixed, and there are cranes in the sky. We have the nation's first offshore wind farm. We are teaching computer science in every public school. And we're ranked best in the nation for pre-K.
**We need your help to keep our momentum going through election day.[Can you please click here and contribute before the DEADLINE at midnight tomorrow??](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a018/5e076a9e/541c7ee8/14425b62/3990689818/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raimondo?refcode=180831")**
We will be grateful for anything you can do -- $7, $13, $27, $64, $100, $250, $500.
Rhode Island cannot afford to go backwards. **[Please chip in TODAY to help us hit our goal and secure our future.](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a018/5e076a9e/541c7ee8/14425b62/3990689818/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raimondo?refcode=180831") Let's keep our comeback.**
Best,
Kate
Kate Ramstad
Finance Director

\-------
###### Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo. This email is not intended for any Rhode Island state government employees. If you are a Rhode Island state government employee, please disregard and let us know so we can unsubscribe you from future emails. Per Rhode Island State Law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $1,000 per year. Business and corporate checks are prohibited.
###### Friends of Gina Raimondo
PO Box 40794
Providence, RI 02940
###### This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
###### If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, visit [https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/unsubscribe](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a018/5e076a9e/541c7ee8/14425b65/3990689818/VEsC/ "https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/unsubscribe").

Even elected officials from his own party recogniz Peter, It's not even Labor Day, but the bad news for corrupt, career politician Bob Menendez keeps coming. _The Hill_ reported this week that a Democrat Councilman bucked his party and endorsed Bob Hugin to be New Jersey’s next Senator 一 a clear sign that Bob Menendez continues to struggle. clean_body: It's not even Labor Day, but the bad news for corrupt, career politician Bob Menendez keeps coming. Even elected officials from his own party recogniz Peter, It's not even Labor Day, but the bad news for corrupt, career politician Bob Menendez keeps coming. The Hill reported this week that a Democrat Councilman bucked his party and endorsed Bob Hugin to be New Jersey’s next Senator 一 a clear sign that Bob Menendez continues to struggle. Democrats, Independents, and Republicans all across New Jersey recognize that Bob Hugin is the "Better Bob" in this race. SCHUMER AND PELOSI IN NEW JERSEY As support for Menendez continues to decline among New Jerseyans, Bob Menendez is desperately trying to save his political career. In a last minute effort, Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi are spending hundreds of thousands of dollars to try and buy his re-election. OUR TWO NEW TV ADS "New Jersey First" has been the theme of Bob’s campaign since he announced his candidacy and it will continue to be his theme after he is elected November 6 th . "Truth" sets the record straight on the dishonest, desperate effort by Menendez to lie about Bob Hugin’s impeccable reputation with character attacks. Click play to watch " ." name: Jason Yates
subject: SCOTUS WATCH #4
body:
| | Critical Supreme Court Updates from a Faith Perspective
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=kaowy9aAKiKTtZMTE7lU74Emp41Dm5T06q1xK7UUBBPw28BVYwAAl_1D24I9HLL13XKuhq4DBJpE0Kyxh8wKnYoiQMA8q_VT9xBxUd5PobM&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180831com01&n=1)
| On July 9, 2018, President Donald Trump nominated Brett Kavanaugh to succeed Associate Justice Anthony Kennedy on the U.S. Supreme Court, and on Tuesday, September 4, his confirmation hearings will begin. It’s been reported Senator Rob Portman, former Secretary of State Condoleezza Rice, and attorney Lisa Blatt will introduce Judge Kavanaugh at his hearings. If confirmed, Judge Kavanaugh would shift the balance of constitutional jurisprudence to the right, creating a solid conservative majority on the court possibly until the second half of the 21st century. Even before President Trump made his nomination, the war of opinions had already been waged. Reminiscent of Super Bowl memorabilia prepped for both teams before game night, liberal activists planned protests, signs, chants, and headlines for the President’s top three potential nominees—**all identifying as people of faith**. Many on the left instantly criticized Kavanaugh’s faith and expressed concern about the implications of his religious beliefs and conservative views could have on the court. Partisans on the left in Congress and the mainstream media have weaponized his faith as a threat to democracy—bemoaning his “religious privilege” will not just “stop time” but “turn back the clock.”
* _Fortune_ —“Why Brett Kavanaugh is a huge threat to Minority Rights”
* _The Hill_ —”American women need to see the full paper trail of Brett Kavanaugh”
* _San Francisco Chronicle_ —“Kavanaugh is not good for the country”

Progressive groups, like Indivisible, are urging their followers to oppose Kavanaugh, saying, “Just by the fact that Donald Trump chose Brett Kavanaugh, we already know two things about him: he is willing to gut reproductive rights, and is hostile to the Affordable Care Act.” I think we can agree on one thing, issues of life and religious liberty are at stake in America. This should make all of us pay attention to Kavanaugh’s confirmation and take a stand, and not just evangelicals. In fact, a majority of Americans think religious liberty is on the decline according to a 2013 LifeWay Research study. Furthermore, the United States is not in good company with its approach to abortion. Some estimate that roughly 3,000 babies are aborted every day in the U.S. In fact, we are in a group of seven countries (including North Korea and China) that have some of the most permissive abortion laws in the world. Whether or not we overturn Roe v. Wade, we have the potential to make good strides in stronger laws protecting the sanctity of life. **But the political and cultural divide in America will not make Kavanaugh’s confirmation easy.** Vice President Pence tweeted this week, “Justice Antonin Scalia was confirmed 98-0 and Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg received the support of 96 Senators. If we lived in a more respectful time, Judge Brett Kavanaugh would be overwhelmingly confirmed by the United States Senate.” This Tuesday, as we begin to see the ideological zealots interrogate a person of faith who just happens to be a nominee for the Supreme Court, remember this: **Authentic people of faith succeed by being faithful to the interpretation of Scripture. In the same way, the best jurists will achieve generational results by remaining steadfast to the interpretation of the Constitution.** Brett Kavanaugh’s record leads us to believe he will be this kind of Supreme Court Justice. **Will you join me in doing two things?** First, pray for a swift Supreme Court confirmation and win for life and Religious liberty. Second, contact your Senators and let them know you expect them to vote YES to confirm Brett Kavanaugh. You can do so using our [easy-to-use tool](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=y-LzAYldKP3pRBygm3-JIlQvDS8MXMa9LrOBr5e9iqQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180831com01&n=2). Please, do it today. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=y-LzAYldKP3pRBygm3-JIlQvDS8MXMa9LrOBr5e9iqQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180831com01&n=3) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=sVjtaaM76uhcQh9rzPgTdK4k3HxH01oD63ZpN_IJlPNatv8_0oIrKklbMGLigco6&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180831com01&n=4) P.S. Don’t miss any of our breaking updates on SCOTUS WATCH. Check out previous editions at: [https://myfaithvotes.org/scotuswatch](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=kaowy9aAKiKTtZMTE7lU74Emp41Dm5T06q1xK7UUBBPw28BVYwAAl_1D24I9HLL1PT0X7b9GPfxrPDpQg2zLyw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180831com01&n=5).
* * *
[Support My Faith Votes with your tax deductible donation.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=kaowy9aAKiKTtZMTE7lU74Emp41Dm5T06q1xK7UUBBPMLIHIYMtyejvAWWLEYVBE&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180831com01&n=6) _My Faith Votes is a non-partisan movement focused on motivating Christians in America to participate in local and national elections and be active members of society. By partnering with local churches, pastors, and national faith leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and equips Christians to lead the conversation on the place of faith in culture and politics._

[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=sVjtaaM76uhcQh9rzPgTdEwq0h-m2KP4-gRK_Ejbcpnnhoc2vJVdqrrvYjvimPHx&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180831com01&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=sVjtaaM76uhcQh9rzPgTdP_0YQpAOXblyATdpPNdGRj7O7zFruZelbkm4whUx_Cq&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180831com01&n=9) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=sVjtaaM76uhcQh9rzPgTdKh-OzFIdhhvVyk8SL1R7nXdDFC3s2_El9v7wTa-upgx&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180831com01&n=10)

name: Shelby Rogers, Jeremy Ring for CFO
subject: Just a little bit more
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| Friends and Neighbors -- Wow, this is incredible. Because of amazing supporters like you, we are now almost at our goal for the month of August -- and our first for the General Election season! As we get closer to November, we need your help, more than ever before, to spread Jeremy's message to voters from the Panhandle to the Everglades: **as our next CFO, Jeremy will fight for everyday Floridians and build an innovation-centered economy, prioritizing entrepreneurial endeavors and job growth in Florida.** But we are still $1,500 short of our August goal -- **and we can 't get there without your help.** **[Can you make a donation of $20.18 or more by midnight to help send Jeremy to the cabinet? ](https://act.myngp.com/el/3V2aMme0FNXdQb11HeN1r5UJF2LHoCe5OcLxWdbRviE=/U50NbFVYWrgi0vEJWDM9ryfk7S35FhJYiYxBTqoVdjc=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&)** Thank you for all of your support, **Shelby** \- Shelby Rogers, Finance Director - Jeremy Ring for Florida CFO \---------- Forwarded message ---------- [](https://act.myngp.com/el/3V2aMme0FNXdQb11HeN1r5UJF2LHoCe5OcLxWdbRviE=/9ixOuPqeYjx9iavsK8H_0SFIw3AbIg-NL_Fqidl_AAw=) The office of Florida Chief Financial Officer (CFO) requires the holder to wear a lot of hats - all at the same time. The role may not make many headlines, but the great responsibilities that come with it are consequential to _EVERY_ Floridian. To give you a better idea of all that the role of CFO entails, here is just a sampling of some of the things they do - and are in charge of: \- Oversees the state accounting functions \- Oversight of the state auditing functions \- Oversight of the states unclaimed properties \- Monitors the investments of state funds \- Manages the deferred compensation program \- Manages the risk management program for the state \- Oversight of the Insurance Consumer Service \- Oversight of the insurance agents and agencies and responsible for insurance licensing \- Oversight of licensing and regulations for funeral homes and cemeteries \- Oversight of insurance fraud investigation \- Ensuring businesses have workers compensation coverage \- Assisting injured workers with benefits and re-employment \- Serves as the state fire marshal. And in addition to all of this, the CFO -- along with the Governor, Attorney General, and the Agriculture Commissioner -- serves on the Florida Cabinet, which has the following role in our state government: \- Governing the purchase of state lands \- Serve as the state Clemency Board \- Governing the purchase of state bonds \- Fiduciary trustee for the Florida Retirement System \- Oversight of the state Veterans' Affairs \- Oversight of State Law Enforcement \- Oversight of power plants and transmission line citings \- Financial and insurance regulation for the state [Help JR Get to the Cabinet. Contribute $20.18. >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/3V2aMme0FNXdQb11HeN1r5UJF2LHoCe5OcLxWdbRviE=/U50NbFVYWrgi0vEJWDM9ryfk7S35FhJYiYxBTqoVdjc=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Needless to say, the CFO has a lot to do with the direction our state government takes. They also serve as **an important check and balance to other parts of the Cabinet - including the Governor 's office, as well as the state government's interaction with the federal governmen**t. These days, just watching the news should remind us of the great importance of checks and balances in government - and making sure our leaders are doing right by the people they were elected to serve _(you)._ We have an important opportunity this election year. As your next CFO, **I would be that check and balance in the Cabinet, making sure that your state government spends _YOUR_ money wisely and transparently.** But I have an election to win first. **And I can 't do it without your help****.** **We have another crucial End-of-Month fundraising deadline coming up in just a few days. ** **[Can you contribute $20.18 or more by midnight Saturday, to help me bring checks and balances to the Cabinet?](https://act.myngp.com/el/3V2aMme0FNXdQb11HeN1r5UJF2LHoCe5OcLxWdbRviE=/U50NbFVYWrgi0vEJWDM9ryfk7S35FhJYiYxBTqoVdjc=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&)** Thank you for all of your support, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
---
Jeremy Ring for Florida Chief Financial Officer
PO Box 670311
Coral Springs FL 33067 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/3V2aMme0FNXdQb11HeN1r5UJF2LHoCe5OcLxWdbRviE=/o4IbmIMXK87XV3umYGFGbt-Y0M6y8k_UKzay5R-yXzc=).

name: Jessica Morse
subject: Let's make history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/xOypMevbzVhSeDv9LOTPmqxUXdXPmKobdYQ6_DCwiis=/t3vmBU79WrSSC2aH_o2RwPNCdvvwd5Qm9kjRFgkfzBw=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180830_JM_20180830-augeomjm-ndnr_ndnr_logo)
Peter,
In less than 10 weeks, our nation is going to vote in an election that will go down in history--an election that is, ultimately, about about ending the partisanship that divides our country and putting people ahead of special interests.
**A coalition of community members across the political spectrum have come together to build our campaign --and momentum is on our side. But to win, we need the resources to get our bipartisan message out. Now is when I need your help the most--help us hit our August fundraising goal with a donation now:**
[$15 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/xOypMevbzVhSeDv9LOTPmqxUXdXPmKobdYQ6_DCwiis=/gEPw6xDRVqguoLVkX6prdqUWqp2fqff2n1DGSQxfCbg=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180830_JM_20180830-augeomjm-ndnr_ndnr_15&amount=15) | [$25 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/xOypMevbzVhSeDv9LOTPmqxUXdXPmKobdYQ6_DCwiis=/gEPw6xDRVqguoLVkX6prdqUWqp2fqff2n1DGSQxfCbg=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180830_JM_20180830-augeomjm-ndnr_ndnr_25&amount=25)
---|---
[$50 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/xOypMevbzVhSeDv9LOTPmqxUXdXPmKobdYQ6_DCwiis=/gEPw6xDRVqguoLVkX6prdqUWqp2fqff2n1DGSQxfCbg=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180830_JM_20180830-augeomjm-ndnr_ndnr_50&amount=50) | [$100 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/xOypMevbzVhSeDv9LOTPmqxUXdXPmKobdYQ6_DCwiis=/gEPw6xDRVqguoLVkX6prdqUWqp2fqff2n1DGSQxfCbg=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180830_JM_20180830-augeomjm-ndnr_ndnr_100&amount=100)
[$250 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/xOypMevbzVhSeDv9LOTPmqxUXdXPmKobdYQ6_DCwiis=/gEPw6xDRVqguoLVkX6prdqUWqp2fqff2n1DGSQxfCbg=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180830_JM_20180830-augeomjm-ndnr_ndnr_250&amount=250) | [Other >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/xOypMevbzVhSeDv9LOTPmqxUXdXPmKobdYQ6_DCwiis=/gEPw6xDRVqguoLVkX6prdqUWqp2fqff2n1DGSQxfCbg=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180830_JM_20180830-augeomjm-ndnr_ndnr_other)
**The 2018 election isn 't about changing the political party that is in power.** We are no longer defining winning as the other party losing--we're defining winning as changing the political culture.
Hitting tomorrow night's goal isn't only about putting together the resources to win on November 6 (though that is crucial). **It 's also about demonstrating that a devoted community, hungry for healing, can break down tired political games and uplift our nation.**
Every day for the last 16 months, our community's shared vision that our country can be better has moved me. And with only 39 days left until ballots are mailed out, we need to work together now more than ever to share our vision with the country.
So, let's invest in inspiring the nation. [_**Help us do it by chipping in to help us hit our August fundraising goal.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/xOypMevbzVhSeDv9LOTPmqxUXdXPmKobdYQ6_DCwiis=/V8lmZ7ZqSNvB9gl-8dAt-zVVK4rytftdvqEZ1lSGoSI=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180830_JM_20180830-augeomjm-ndnr_ndnr_l1)
Thank you,
Jessica

name: Jerusalem Demsas
subject: What real environmental victories look like:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Maryland's future can't be in fossil fuels.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bc52/7ab0e2c4/7e2d9296/3498bf89/636824099/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug-deadline?refcode=OHQ08318A") Friend, Today, Ben is being endorsed by the Maryland chapters of the League of Conservation Voters Action Fund and Sierra Club, because they know he's the only candidate ready to make Maryland an environmental leader -- something Larry Hogan refuses to do. While folks in his administration are patting themselves on the back for "environmental victories" like a fracking ban bill, they're also sneaking around to promote fracked gas infrastructure in Maryland. **Don't be fooled: We can make Maryland an environmental leader, but it will take bold progressive leadership to do that -- and Ben's the only candidate with that plan.** [**If you want a cleaner, stronger, and safer Maryland for generations to come, donate $5 or more before tonight's end-of-month deadline.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bc52/7ab0e2c4/7e2d9296/3498bf89/636824099/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug-deadline?refcode=OHQ08318A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bc52/7ab0e2c4/7e2d9296/3498bf88/636824099/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug-deadline?refcode=OHQ08318A&amount=5&express_lane=true")
---

---

---
| [**$250 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bc52/7ab0e2c4/7e2d9296/3498bff4/636824099/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug-deadline?refcode=OHQ08318A&amount=250&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**OTHER »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bc52/7ab0e2c4/7e2d9296/3498bff7/636824099/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug-deadline?refcode=OHQ08318A&express_lane=true")
---
For too long, Republicans have refused to admit that fossil fuels are a dying, dirty energy source. Clean renewables like wind and solar power aren't just smart for our environment, they're smart for our economy -- and Ben knows it.
He's spent years investing in startups that move the needle toward a stronger future for our communities, and that means investing as a state in clean power plans that bring 21st-century jobs to Maryland. Because while Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress are rolling back environmental rules and regulations across the country, we need a strong leader like Ben who is committed to making Maryland a green leader -- now more than ever.
So why are we waiting? Folks in Maryland need a leader who is willing to stand up to the fossil fuel industry, and to build a clean energy future for our state that works for all of us. Ben is exactly that leader.
[**Voters need to know what's at stake for Maryland's environmental future: Donate $5 or more before our huge deadline tonight to help us raise our final $8,485 to fight back against Larry Hogan's dirty fossil fuel agenda.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37bc52/7ab0e2c4/7e2d9296/3498bf89/636824099/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-aug-deadline?refcode=OHQ08318A")
Thanks,
Jerusalem

Communications Director
Ben Jealous for Governor

name: Team Tina
subject: UPDATE: Ratings change (Minnesota Senate)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Our race is within the margin of error.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4accf/c1f7015/6dd14b75/1141f157/3748479125/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180831AM_em&recurring=auto") **BREAKING: The Cook Political Report just downgraded our race, moving this race towards Republicans and leaving us one spot away from a pure "Toss Up."** This is just one week after two polls showed this race in the single digits. One of them within four points -- right in the margin of error. We can't afford to lose any more ground as we head into September. We must hit our August goal to fend off the special interests and super PACs ready to spend big in this race. **[Can you make a contribution of $10 now before our midnight deadline?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4accf/c1f7015/6dd14b75/1141f157/3748479125/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180831AM_em&recurring=auto")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4accf/c1f7015/6dd14b75/1141f2a8/3748479125/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180831AM_em-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

We can't afford to come up short, friend. **The Star-Tribune said "control of the Senate... and the fate of Trump's agenda are on the line," and we have to fight like it in this moment.**
It's going to take every dollar you have to fight back against McConnell, Trump, and the massive special interests spending millions to keep the Republican majority in the Senate.
**[Tina's counting on us to have her back as she takes on Kavanaugh's nomination and Trump's agenda in the Senate. We can't afford to lose any more ground as we head into September. We must hit our August goal to fend off the special interests and super PACs ready to spend big in this race. Tonight's deadline is a big one for us, Friend. Our performance tonight will dictate how aggressive our Break the Majority operation can be during the home stretch of this election. Here's the landscape right now: We're less than 10 weeks out from Election Day. We have Democrats running in each district in North Carolina. Volunteers and organizers across the state are pounding the pavement and calling their friends and neighbors. **Our team is in full Break the Majority mode right now. But we have to keep up this pace in order to be successful in November.**

[**My finance team told me we needed to raise $20,000 before the end-of-month deadline. GREG PENCE VICTORY is a joint fundraising committee composed of GREG PENCE FOR CONGRESS, MUSTANG PAC, GREAT AMERICA COMMITTEE, and the NRCC.
Any contribution to GREG PENCE VICTORY permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended, from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable contribution limits will be allocated among the participating committees as follows:
a) The first $2,700 from an individual shall be allocated to GREG PENCE FOR CONGRESS, to the maximum allowed for the General Election. The second $5,000 from an individual shall be allocated to MUSTANG PAC. The next $5,000 shall go to the GREAT AMERICA COMMITTEE. Any remaining funds up to $33,900 shall go to the NRCC.
b) The first $5,400 of a joint contribution shall be allocated to GREG PENCE FOR CONGRESS, to the maximum allowed for the General Election. The second $10,000 of a joint contribution shall be allocated to MUSTANG PAC. The next $10,000 shall go to GREAT AMERICA COMMITTEE. Any remaining funds up to $67,800 shall go to the NRCC.
c) The first $2,700 from a federal non-multicandidate committee shall be allocated to GREG PENCE FOR CONGRESS, to the maximum allowed for the General Election. The second $5,000 from a federal non-multicandidate committee shall be allocated to MUSTANG PAC. The next $5,000 shall go to the GREAT AMERICA COMMITTEE. Any remaining funds up to $33,900 shall go to the NRCC.
d) The first $5,000 from a federal multicandidate committee shall be allocated to GREG PENCE FOR CONGRESS, to the maximum allowed for the General Election. The second $5,000 shall be allocated to MUSTANG PAC. The next $5,000 shall go to the GREAT AMERICA COMMITTEE. Any remaining funds up to $15,000 shall go to the NRCC.
The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution as described above. Contributions that exceed a contributor's contribution limit to a participating committee shall be reallocated to the remaining participating committees according to this allocation formula and as permitted by law.
The legal maximum that an individual and non-multicandidate political action committee may contribute to GREG PENCE VICTORY in a calendar year is $46,600 subject to the increase for inflation in 2019. The legal maximum amount couples may contribute is $93,200 if each spouse so designates the contributions, subject to the increase for inflation in 2019. The legal maximum that a multi-candidate political action committee may contribute to GREG PENCE VICTORY is
$30,000 in a calendar year. Notwithstanding the allocation formula described above,

contributions may be designated by the contributor for a specific committee, to the extent permitted by law.
The maximum an individual may contribute to a federal candidate is $2,700 per election subject to an increase for inflation during odd-numbered years; $5,000 per calendar year to a federal political action committee; and $33,900 per calendar year to a national party committee subject to an increase for inflation during odd-numbered years. Qualified multicandidate PACs may contribute $5,000 per election to a federal candidate, $5,000 per calendar year to a federal political action committee, and $15,000 per calendar year to a national party committee. Non multicandidate PACs may contribute $2,700 per election to a federal candidate, $5,000 per calendar year to a federal political action committee and $33,900 per calendar year to a national party committee, subject to an increase for inflation during odd-numbered years. All funds received in response to this solicitation will be subject to federal contribution limits and prohibitions. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited.
Contributions to GREG PENCE VICTORY, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.

| | **We 've got some bad news, Derek. **
* With less [than 24 hours to go until our August fundraising deadline,](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1165/3e0906/6df76ec2/3e3694ff/3625341312/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-august-eom?refcode=20180831_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-7-Worse-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+than+24+hours+to+go+until+our+August+fun&utm_campaign=20180831_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-7-Worse-LDND&source=20180831_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-7-Worse-LDND") we're still [275 donations short](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1165/3e0906/6df76ec2/3e3694fe/3625341312/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-august-eom?refcode=20180831_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-7-Worse-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+275+donations+short&utm_campaign=20180831_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-7-Worse-LDND&source=20180831_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-7-Worse-LDND") of hitting our goal.

**But it gets worse.**
* If we miss our goal, our campaign won't have the resources to help Virginia's Congressional candidates flip their seats from red to blue - _risking Democrats ' chances of taking back the House and Senate this November._

**Don 't let that happen: [Chip in now to make sure our campaign stays on track to support all Virginia Democrats.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1165/3e0906/6df76ec2/3e3694fd/3625341312/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-august-eom?refcode=20180831_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-7-Worse-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+now+to+make+sure+our+campaign+st&utm_campaign=20180831_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-7-Worse-LDND&source=20180831_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-7-Worse-LDND")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1165/3e0906/6df76ec2/3e3694fc/3625341312/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-august-eom?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180831_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-7-Worse-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180831_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-7-Worse-LDND&source=20180831_1_FR_TEAM_EOM-7-Worse-LDND")

name: ZephyrForNY.com
subject: still short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
I wanted to send you a quick note.
#

Peter -
Our team has a busy day of campaigning ahead of us, but I wanted to send you a quick note about where we stand heading into today's deadline.
Right now, we're still short of our goal, and that's not good. We know exactly what we need to do to win, and we have a plan to do it. But part of that plan includes hitting our fundraising goals along the way.
**[Will you make a $3 donation right now to help us close the gap? I would not ask if it wasn't so important.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780913/6e822e2f/1a9fa12e/4173af10/3661703692/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MzEtMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-primary-deadline?refcode=em180831-1-full")**
We have a lot of big plans before the primary in just two weeks, but we have to have the resources to execute those plans as well.
As you may know, we've rejected all corporate money, but our opponents are trying to rake in as much corporate money as they can. They're hoping they can drown out our message at the end, but with your help, we can stop them.
Our plan accounts for fighting back against whatever attacks our opponents will try to throw our way. They may have the money, but we have the people. And we'll take grassroots strength over big money donors every day.
But that means that we need to ask:
**[Will you make a $3 donation before our final fundraising deadline ends? This isn't just about how much we raise, but how many people are pitching in to take ownership of this campaign.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780913/6e822e2f/1a9fa12e/4173af10/3661703692/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MzEtMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-primary-deadline?refcode=em180831-1-full")**
Thanks for being with us here. So long as we're together, we're going to win.
Dan Torres
Campaign Manager
Zephyr for NY
[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780913/6e822e2f/1a9fa12e/4173af10/3661703692/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MzEtMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-primary-deadline?refcode=em180831-1-full")

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY
---
1789 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10035

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780913/6e822e2f/1a9fa12e/4173af11/3661703692/VEsC/ "http://zephyr.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Zephyr with a contribution, click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780913/6e822e2f/1a9fa12e/4173af12/3661703692/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-for-ny?refcode=em_footer").

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: we need more leaders like Abigail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Congress needs more leaders who are public servants to their core. Congress needs more leaders like Abigail Spanberger.
| | Peter, Congress needs more leaders who are public servants to their core. _Congress needs more leaders like Abigail Spanberger._ Abigail, a former CIA officer whose record of service stands out among candidates across the country, is running a compelling, grassroots campaign to turn a historically Republican district blue. **Her race could deliver the House majority for Democrats.** [**Join me in supporting Abigail with a donation today, before her end-of-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GjzG9eOU1majmqsgFpT7OySya5EwgaBy-8VfzaKafh8=/chjz4mblV9MCZWxU3VQPftAUG24CRfuzJRA1sOnLe7c=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.31_b1_jk_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) When you look at what's wrong with Congress, it's obvious that too many of the people in power are out of touch with the basic needs of working families in this country. Last year, Republican leaders put forward a health care bill that would have taken critical protections away from millions of the most vulnerable Americans, and they took a vote without understanding its full implications. Abigail decided to run for Congress after she saw her opponent take that vote. And in the year-plus since, her grassroots campaign has inspired hundreds of Virginians to become involved in political activism for the first time. **Abigail 's race is now a toss-up, a testament to the depth of her grassroots support, and to the generosity of concerned citizens like you.** But turning her toss-up race into a win won't be easy, and Abigail is counting on you to help as she enters the critical final stretch. [**Peter, make a donation to Abigail 's campaign today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GjzG9eOU1majmqsgFpT7OySya5EwgaBy-8VfzaKafh8=/chjz4mblV9MCZWxU3VQPftAUG24CRfuzJRA1sOnLe7c=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.31_b1_jk_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) I look forward to serving working families alongside her in Congress -- but I need [**your help**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GjzG9eOU1majmqsgFpT7OySya5EwgaBy-8VfzaKafh8=/chjz4mblV9MCZWxU3VQPftAUG24CRfuzJRA1sOnLe7c=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.31_b1_jk_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) to get her there first. Thank you, Joe Kennedy III P.S. Republicans are so scared of Abigail and her campaign, news broke this week that their operatives improperly obtained her federal security clearance application in an attempt to get and leak highly sensitive, personal information about her. These are the kind of dirty tricks we're up against. [**Donate now to help Abigail fight back.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GjzG9eOU1majmqsgFpT7OySya5EwgaBy-8VfzaKafh8=/chjz4mblV9MCZWxU3VQPftAUG24CRfuzJRA1sOnLe7c=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.31_b1_jk_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/GjzG9eOU1majmqsgFpT7OySya5EwgaBy-8VfzaKafh8=/chjz4mblV9MCZWxU3VQPftAUG24CRfuzJRA1sOnLe7c=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.31_b1_jk_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/GjzG9eOU1majmqsgFpT7OySya5EwgaBy-8VfzaKafh8=/chjz4mblV9MCZWxU3VQPftAUG24CRfuzJRA1sOnLe7c=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/GjzG9eOU1majmqsgFpT7OySya5EwgaBy-8VfzaKafh8=/wvRtvfhDUs1rCHq7JWa4xUy6a9wvPLFewwFOi7KNUKI=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/GjzG9eOU1majmqsgFpT7OySya5EwgaBy-8VfzaKafh8=/ljiasxUMtq97Oy7e4HCNHv9UZLtZaTXTaJSA9enWBOA=).

In order to secure as many Republican victories this November as possible, we need ALL supporters to step up and contribute NOW to help protect and strengthen our Senate Majority. Fellow Conservative, We don’t want to alarm you, but, as of this moment, we’re still significantly behind our August fundraising goal. Democrats are drowning us in negative and misleading attack ads. We need committed supporters like you to step up, so we can meet our fundraising goal this month and defeat Democrats in November! I just went over the numbers, and we still have around $10,000 left to raise. We cannot end the month with that big of a budget gap -- missing our fundraising goal would mean we can't run the robust campaign we need to after Johnson's announcement.

In response to Johnson's last minute campaign, we released two television ads in the past month, and we're expanding our on-the-ground presence so we can talk to even more voters. Our growing campaign means an ever-increasing budget, however, and that's why I am asking for your help today.

name: Kathy Manning
subject: Today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Chances are you are tying up loose ends before the three-day weekend. The last thing you want to receive is a fundraising email. Unfortunately, we have no other choice. I will be honest with you. Today is the most critical day of the campaign yet. I need your help before midnight. **Today, President Trump comes to town to support Rep. Ted Budd. And it is also the deadline for our August fundraising goal.** [**Rush in a contribution before midnight.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279ec/e3b7d3/5d974b45/25553145/3199578793/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180831am?refcode=kme180831am_m&recurring=true") We've had several tests so far in this campaign. We have excelled each and every time. But understand that with the President here and the nation's eyes on us, today is our biggest test yet. If we hit our August goal, we will tell special interests we are not afraid of the outside spending and that their favorite bought-and-sold politician, Rep.Ted Budd, will soon be out of a job. [**Tonight's our deadline to reach $45,000. We're still $750 behind. Rush in a contribution right now, if you can, and help us crush this goal.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279ec/e3b7d3/5d974b45/25553145/3199578793/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180831am?refcode=kme180831am_m&recurring=true") [**Here is a link: www.kathymanning2018.com/augustdeadline**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279ec/e3b7d3/5d974b45/25553145/3199578793/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180831am?refcode=kme180831am_m&recurring=true") Making a contribution will only take a few minutes and it will help bring us the rest of the way home. Thanks! Kathy Manning

I will be honest with you. Today is the most critical day of the campaign yet. I need your help before midnight. Today, President Trump comes to town to support Rep. Ted Budd. And it is also the deadline for our August fundraising goal. "" We've had several tests so far in this campaign. We have excelled each and every time. But understand that with the President here and the nation's eyes on us, today is our biggest test yet. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=86ed7d8e213f496e8cecaa868a50ec30&_e=E_9SD7uaqsJ1Gd4KqK5Cr_YZ_4xMdMh_0nv0QzTwyRveemyYuFVBR0GcZBukfxblPuj_ninMHhJ0OMA0YSP8jtd48oAHWxNVe6i3Q--hwkEng64WZBJeWF2ewz6scZkmsZSbnLPOw5Ir1krXfNelCre0QEIdiheEkv9CbmqNmaXplrX-RHeCIdmDYt30r4IkOSscHwG6dbBGBeiJnZxRAhfDZ42LNJnjfupmUCVhH-Spapd_VBrNBQE-oVcXcNzYWUAtkiiBJEuR3GCfYRRoj4u5PO04gykLLGUbGsedeAO9B2ux4A3xPxYTncpDS9JOk9wOjcW_lpOtKlpulQB1GRpazqRNoU-h4XAL8-VkWmP2OTHNNmN8YFxEvCi15WKfIrW5s1xYemYxUK3JcObkXByD_QJaKNRTKJQAxp3w1q0%3D)

[**Can you chip in right now?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=86ed7d8e213f496e8cecaa868a50ec30&_e=E_9SD7uaqsJ1Gd4KqK5Cr_YZ_4xMdMh_0nv0QzTwyRszfA28ZGVIjrc830-OUYTpfBck1Ql7aVIqTqjtAYfqW3JNmAn9oJNtWZCNpV-t1mObROhlAIb6ErWgLmfXhb8eNjXqpmWUfyDJLN44-vuW8T3mTfwiDDr8QJRRu0d44c-Mv7qCbd4aHMt9OuKtAhq2IqnpqMlZnFbygiB_Wrt9yRcukkt-iwVOEJ4f-m123dwqqsARyTN8zCzSxC61kUw60TNPZ80t1eh8o3bX1LBiwjcEJ8jiU5wjYrsXwgC2PrRjIdiLbwE96_INV2iVTn04fm0Nd729jxKfouPkyP14RCGCvqwbu5vaW_ZoIaPgJmj-vjCyrm9otoVxRIljXOI7J7fVDsZf-GkP3viaexXGSiDgYj_pms3HGecklxpY0jI%3D)

\-----forwarded message below-----

Friend,

This has been quite a month. First, despite everyone who said we couldn’t do it, we won the GOP nomination for U.S. Senate. Then, we became Tammy Baldwin's number one target.

Now, we're coming up on the first end-of-month fundraising deadline of our head-to-head with Tammy Baldwin.

And everyone will be watching.

That’s why it’s more important than ever that we make this one count. But Friend, we’re still $12,922 away from our goal. [**Can you chip in today to help us make it?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=86ed7d8e213f496e8cecaa868a50ec30&_e=E_9SD7uaqsJ1Gd4KqK5Cr_YZ_4xMdMh_0nv0QzTwyRszfA28ZGVIjrc830-OUYTpfBck1Ql7aVIqTqjtAYfqW3JNmAn9oJNtWZCNpV-t1mObROhlAIb6ErWgLmfXhb8eNjXqpmWUfyDJLN44-vuW8T3mTfwiDDr8QJRRu0d44c-Mv7qCbd4aHMt9OuKtAhq2MMlj1ZNz4aLVFRpL0MflAF38LACmncrHW71jdhflOcjNe6nflghCQ6VXQhqovBJxP0YfZNepUDRgz4F3LkH-1gFk36CS_dJyKwHx-2YU6ReHGSBCWJaBF85teslE4tdWsWUWFNMEMiPmdrqIWAsZe2AWrjkJ_-injt8OIMMIpOE8nqbBJE0HZnhsONKBu6cyg5M40tZq50Sll-fv66QK8mFAGCD3FLNHEcU-gX1Vbcc%3D)

Friend, let's not forget how high the stakes are — if we don't do what it takes to win, Tammy Baldwin will get another six years of sitting on her hands and doing NOTHING for Wisconsin.

Let's face it – Tammy Baldwin fails to represent our Wisconsin values in so many ways.
* In her vote against Neil Gorsuch, and her plan to obstruct Brett Kavanaugh for the Supreme Court.
* In how she voted against the tax cuts that are giving $1,600 in tax relief to middle-class families and voted to raise taxes on small businesses.
* In how she campaigns for socialized, government-run health care that will bankrupt us and destroy quality.
* In how she failed to help our veterans at the Tomah VA, and hired Hillary Clinton’s lawyer to try and cover up the scandal.

I could go on and on — but I’ll tell you what — none of that is the Wisconsin Way. I know it, and you know it, too.

The results of this end-of-month effort will directly reflect how ready we are to take on Tammy Baldwin.

You can be certain that if we don’t hit our goal, Baldwin's campaign will be jumping for joy.

But I know we can raise enough and prove we’re ready to win it. We just need to work together now: **[https://secure.anedot.com/leah/donate/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=86ed7d8e213f496e8cecaa868a50ec30&_e=E_9SD7uaqsJ1Gd4KqK5Cr_YZ_4xMdMh_0nv0QzTwyRszfA28ZGVIjrc830-OUYTpfBck1Ql7aVIqTqjtAYfqW3JNmAn9oJNtWZCNpV-t1mObROhlAIb6ErWgLmfXhb8eNjXqpmWUfyDJLN44-vuW8T3mTfwiDDr8QJRRu0d44c-Mv7qCbd4aHMt9OuKtAhq2s6CoEoUf8banYAIkzdUrm_hqOj0kCI8NNnqJtxwV_VtjhEIybSsAUekgdYCc0931vUCVEmnX2BWFrVhxODySI_QyvsP922fjaKQsyUMukvoxrjg5Omk-VVCglbxdl2bL83n6UlTjczVVVzhtWvztrYY7gJWSUkdj4aGHf1JgLIBJC7ZTZWEhuSbJh8TI6fNmCBtjv76TCb5M6wchdzPihw5jGebzR5x7nolxA85wElA%3D)**

Let’s show them how strong we are.

Thank you,

Leah

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=86ed7d8e213f496e8cecaa868a50ec30&_e=E_9SD7uaqsJ1Gd4KqK5CrydWz1oR1IEb8pK-4ZKWeiDms1rjRrAa0sj3_MpR1RjZxKGbWG-NpFYApVP4AzZ4MPWv7Km5ooBXAtE0zs7fabdjhdTFnZJbQYWSLaXRKHWUaMNn6oqbf3r9Vdc4poT9zUuCdjCknTeec3aQzfprUEGVM2rd3IuFEjumWFSDAstD16cyJz4ssRxXpz6VFCqauOtAaGcfTflQyEt0A4T-NhmsiUhRUHaDSNXYehu-rmZRovSlBOqzC3WPQyKpAljOSg%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=86ed7d8e213f496e8cecaa868a50ec30&_e=E_9SD7uaqsJ1Gd4KqK5Cr7cMoVaq5JisBBRtDRYmr4KWqJLWsmgMZjf28_x6eDtI9N8BGwSp5JvQvoibSKv7CREkdlc2Yv3hNxWgE85YtzOhEL4KcwoskbO7F0HWYZxqyTM8hLghsx8epvBYKeRl4RK-X9BFqqyifOFIAHoTP8O4Wgh-WybvzGYUcK2lUl3whbpXK5DZXeeIxcaRjBPfEZ1GC_gr1cN2BYwEhG68I2ceDVc5ubyiacUE1QpcP4dLaxpohs26MntR0E4DWLc8jQ%3D%3D)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=86ed7d8e213f496e8cecaa868a50ec30&_e=l8TTef582sxvmhIgZfZdIjJf_d92toCAQE1YATnuE3aeb7y3v-GID_TtlWgcminHRRxH9wANlOWyujF6Owp2MkaHpEhhjyHLFJife54KSrxvvk1CC1N_EIU1hXXCkRVWEY-AU9f2oBuOwCVLmagevC0qil37eKsw02KASV-8vlW87wpiihFKHAwivpQSMFynYYYnGHYG1QQFuOAj2O2U47_cLvz3_lixgq6D77oYVAdJGPiHQQ_kgrIaQMMolDbX). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=86ed7d8e213f496e8cecaa868a50ec30&_e=E_9SD7uaqsJ1Gd4KqK5Cr3PPPT7y4TwtprgH5m53wVD65ZLlGbwZcMZwU1kQbrxLjEgj3WDExYfDmjAjNmO2-M0uUw2zjhgwlD5RcU2o5ckJPDUiRqVWZa8bDht_xJbkBhNDQZOqUy4JwGy1h3STiOOrue2bYi_cJ0uQ5brBwiY07UlRQU63Ce9KbuWj-0uZWxFZfGQAL8Aqauw-ip99UOWdy2mTx43ii7Ev83ZGtaxanLmAfk4OIORFHfZPEtMYwua8O-FEpGa-J8a6JUQ5udT9AA8Fv-RSEbtoCCjYkNlNAeiMPuPFxTRuSQPN2n3FfOoRLY7QwRmXX0g9T-zmd4p0Zr2HrHNEkkyIANJpt9c7O8zmkwZdhrcvb83Q_cI7) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=86ed7d8e213f496e8cecaa868a50ec30&_e=E_9SD7uaqsJ1Gd4KqK5Cr3PPPT7y4TwtprgH5m53wVC1WoN8Xk7bd0nUDxMMEmhMlahgrgPoalPIIUFXWrID-Xn5B8EWiim6yZz-lYucM_U-IOMzsaUkxsjbt4FhrFVsudtNdKoIen2i4e16sW8jBsqm2AyEeicczg8P8nz_8Pfk_cMZG7LbJ2TjrpN7XE_pxZAcujYZS2x37vFZBZV36A--GvbKY9GtpXiLUwizEA45ZyI_5ZySjIO_AKXoSrsykSVmsEEKlVbv1Gq_olAz71dCE07837UMo9E2BGuT8LZleBGOberGiXYnbGOvx-H8No6skN1hH9P34RRRURva6S33g715iZbJYHPrA44BJ7uZzuG49-VQfPdzyW1IYbR-) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=86ed7d8e213f496e8cecaa868a50ec30&_e=E_9SD7uaqsJ1Gd4KqK5CrydWz1oR1IEb8pK-4ZKWeiDms1rjRrAa0sj3_MpR1RjZhHxTE5ilYH-aUc3k9hpM0ShNF298k9fZGxBI6aYk5BzpRwVTLhBecpvz0S9F_JLAYNYLWxwROQQozsqzW5sfN3aTlHmdZ8G-Ko35iMbZrbU4hA5T_YTj7YOccCHNbVrWCL-GjCW8AdhsQqStZwChhLzKvFmE_9qGp4vfQnBc1PpjFpBOqzKHvvkleYz2yRWnkYhY5ya2TFzoUAuMtMslKA%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=86ed7d8e213f496e8cecaa868a50ec30&_e=E_9SD7uaqsJ1Gd4KqK5Cr7cMoVaq5JisBBRtDRYmr4KWqJLWsmgMZjf28_x6eDtIMCqf9H1FjmY7vcFRSVORxheXR598hjD1As4ndyIXvfUle0aXya-k2TDAlfxmYT98qrPnjGFCNhFx21tqEtAGy0gAZb37U3V8K5Go8pXRh5r40CM1fgodWp7uU76UCBytTyS7WmPFfZ7yUC0DZe_QqP7gphoqKCc9iew2YvFbHpbSfPrrwGPP-7KXHP8CX9nKomL3ixWnQRS8KBydn0maCA%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=86ed7d8e213f496e8cecaa868a50ec30&_e=E_9SD7uaqsJ1Gd4KqK5Cr5olfdMRJIZOW3e8DO5OcxapWhxPTn6kJAYCzdaEn0Ufm2EgD0I9BjHot20ORkNgcr2Q2bViHF2WZpw-OAHisG6v483fwIe-4IJw_VPlrqNuZQ0_FfQgQxPHAqp4HwnuhSe93rR4j8DFp5K3OPJY-LvTxtgtlqiYWd4_rIctXwxeysPQ_85BwMOu5Q6NJOjZBjHxu_rrON2S3Yo80B3AuEPV2jlaoFfuxJ1fMm8FGDXuX9uQlVgLC1v-oGpW8DFvSg%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. clean_body: We’re reaching one of the most crucial deadlines of our entire campaign in just a few hours. EVERYONE is watching, and I want to make sure they...... Friend, we’re reaching one of the most crucial deadlines of our entire campaign in just a few hours. It’s our first end-of-month deadline since winning the primary, and I’m trying to reach as many conservatives as possible to ensure we meet our goal. EVERYONE is watching, and I want to make sure they know just how strong we are. It should only take a second, but it will mean a lot to ensure we take the Wisconsin Way to DC. Thanks, friend. -Leah \-----forwarded message below----- Friend, This has been quite a month. First, despite everyone who said we couldn’t do it, we won the GOP nomination for U.S. Senate. Then, we became Tammy Baldwin's number one target. Now, we're coming up on the first end-of-month fundraising deadline of our head-to-head with Tammy Baldwin. And everyone will be watching. That’s why it’s more important than ever that we make this one count. But Friend, we’re still $12,922 away from our goal. Friend, let's not forget how high the stakes are — if we don't do what it takes to win, Tammy Baldwin will get another six years of sitting on her hands and doing NOTHING for Wisconsin. Let's face it – Tammy Baldwin fails to represent our Wisconsin values in so many ways. In her vote against Neil Gorsuch, and her plan to obstruct Brett Kavanaugh for the Supreme Court. In how she voted against the tax cuts that are giving $1,600 in tax relief to middle-class families and voted to raise taxes on small businesses. In how she campaigns for socialized, government-run health care that will bankrupt us and destroy quality. In how she failed to help our veterans at the Tomah VA, and hired Hillary Clinton’s lawyer to try and cover up the scandal. I could go on and on — but I’ll tell you what — none of that is the Wisconsin Way. I know it, and you know it, too. The results of this end-of-month effort will directly reflect how ready we are to take on Tammy Baldwin. You can be certain that if we don’t hit our goal, Baldwin's campaign will be jumping for joy. But I know we can raise enough and prove we’re ready to win it. We just need to work together now: Let’s show them how strong we are. Thank you, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Quick note about Labor Day weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
This weekend we remember the generations of Americans who risked everything to make life better for all working people. The minimum wage, workplace safety standards, Social Security -- and of course,
Folks,

We won't be sending any emails over Labor Day weekend. Enjoy the holiday!

This weekend we remember the generations of Americans who risked everything to make life better for all working people. The minimum wage, workplace safety standards, Social Security -- and of course, the weekend -- are all the result of this struggle.

At the same time, wealthy interests have always sought to divide us on the basis of race, creed, and nationality to keep progress from marching forward. Not too long ago, my Irish and Italian ancestors were the scapegoats. Today, the President demonizes new immigrants to distract from his tax cuts for fellow billionaires.

**[Labor Day is a time to honor the labor movement -- and nothing honors that struggle more than continuing their fight. Find a volunteer opportunity near you this weekend>>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a924e/5486deaa/2ad63c41/dcf8b74/2384069165/VEsH/ "http://events.mobilizeamerica.io/ohdems/")**

There are many opportunities this weekend (and beyond) to help champions for working people win big in November. Whether you're a campaign veteran or just getting involved, there's something for you to do!

**Go to this site and type in your zip code to find events near you: [https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/ohdems/](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a924e/5486deaa/2ad63c41/dcf8b77/2384069165/VEsE/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/ohdems/")**

Every day we hear about another right-wing billionaire or GOP super PAC spending huge amounts of money to beat great Democrats.

But we believe that the grassroots -- our _people power_ \-- are going to have a greater impact than any negative TV ad. If everyone reading this email gives even a few hours between now and November, we can truly change the course of history and get our country back on track.

**Sign up for an event near you: [https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/ohdems/](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a924e/5486deaa/2ad63c41/dcf8b77/2384069165/VEsF/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/ohdems/")**

Thank you for everything, we really appreciate it!

\-- Tim and the whole Team Ryan crew

**[DONATE](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a924e/5486deaa/2ad63c41/dcf8b76/2384069165/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_aug18?refcode=em20180831_volask_oh")**
Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
---
**Tim Ryan for Congress**
337 Vienna Avenue, Suite 1
Niles, Ohio 44446
If you'd no longer like to receive emails, please [UNSUBSCRIBE](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a924e/5486deaa/2ad63c41/dcf8b79/2384069165/VEsD/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe")

Peter -- You might have seen or heard about the new $2 million ad campaign attacking me. **Here’s the truth: this ad is full of flat-out lies.** We’re already airing a new TV ad across Tennessee to set the record straight so we can keep this race focused on the real issues voters care about here in Tennessee -- and I wanted to ask for your help so we can keep it on the air. **Can you chip in $10 or whatever you think is best so we can keep this race focused on real issues, not false attacks funded by dark money groups and out-of-state billionaires?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2063057/10721665/-1142930280?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTc4ZWE1Mi01ZGFkLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMzY2YzEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0auoLJtc7t3seiAynANbdS9QhsajhQIYz1S-9P9x3wc=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em180831-kochs-6-express-tag&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)

This negative ad, paid for by a dark money group, is nothing more than the same gutter politics that the Washington establishment has been using for years to keep Congress focused on playing partisan games rather than getting things done.
**My opponent, Congresswoman Blackburn, has been in Washington for 16 years now -- and frankly, this ad shows it.**
After months on the campaign trail meeting with voters, I know Tennesseans want their next U.S. Senator to be focused on bringing people together, not tearing them apart with. That’s why I’m applying for the job.
**Chip in $10 today so my team and I have the resources we need to keep putting that message in front of voters. With these new attacks flooding in, your support is more critical than ever.**

clean_body: | Peter -- You might have seen or heard about the new $2 million ad campaign attacking me. Here’s the truth: this ad is full of flat-out lies. We’re already airing a new TV ad across Tennessee to set the record straight so we can keep this race focused on the real issues voters care about here in Tennessee -- and I wanted to ask for your help so we can keep it on the air. Can you chip in $10 or whatever you think is best so we can keep this race focused on real issues, not false attacks funded by dark money groups and out-of-state billionaires? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = This negative ad, paid for by a dark money group, is nothing more than the same gutter politics that the Washington establishment has been using for years to keep Congress focused on playing partisan games rather than getting things done. My opponent, Congresswoman Blackburn, has been in Washington for 16 years now -- and frankly, this ad shows it. After months on the campaign trail meeting with voters, I know Tennesseans want their next U.S. Senator to be focused on bringing people together, not tearing them apart with. That’s why I’m applying for the job. Chip in $10 today so my team and I have the resources we need to keep putting that message in front of voters. With these new attacks flooding in, your support is more critical than ever. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = Thank you for your continued support, —Phil Bredesen Paid for by Bredesen for Senate Bredesen for Senate P.O. Box 92010 Nashville, TN 37209 United States
