name: StaceyAbrams.com
subject: Meet our "boots on the ground"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa991/34a064cc/dfaa8e3/70ec39f/1624075561/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | You have to see this, friend: **THESE are the organizers working to turn Georgia blue.** **[Watch our video to see what our team has been building this summer.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa991/34a064cc/dfaa8e3/70ec39c/1624075561/VEsE/ "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qAs16qysPjo&feature=youtu.be")** [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa991/34a064cc/dfaa8e3/70ec39c/1624075561/VEsF/ "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qAs16qysPjo&feature=youtu.be") Our dedicated and diverse team is building a movement for _all_ of us. For every Georgian who has ever felt ignored by those in power. For our friends and neighbors who don't know they can make a difference. We're putting actions behind those words. Our team is opening new campaign offices in East Point, so more Georgians in more counties can get involved. And we're launching a vote-by-mail push to make sure every eligible Georgian knows to request and return their completed ballot correctly. Without donations from generous supporters like you, we wouldn't have the resources to help our team - the faces you saw in our video - reach out to every single Georgian and make sure no vote goes uncounted and no voice unheard. **Running this kind of field operation in all of Georgia's 159 counties is expensive.** **We only have 67 days left. We know you're with us in this fight, so we have to ask:** **[We're facing a major fundraising deadline - one of the last of our campaign - tonight at midnight. Can you make your first donation of this campaign before our end-of-August deadline? Every dollar gives our growing team of organizers the tools they need to get out the vote. name: Tom Wolf
subject: I'm furious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Hi there,

No one should ever be the victim of workplace discrimination or sexual harassment - and we cannot, and will not, accept this behavior as normal or acceptable.

That's why when I read that Betsy DeVos wanted to change federal policies on campus sexual misconduct that would boost the rights of students accused of rape and sexual assault -- I was furious.

Here in Pennsylvania, I'm fighting to protect victims and pass new laws to fight sexual harassment. "It's on Us PA" has given $950,000 in grants to colleges and universities to end sexual assault on campuses.

My opponent Scott Wagner voted against that funding -- and he supports Donald Trump and Betsy DeVos' backwards policies.

Look, that's why this election is so important. We can't let Scott Wagner put Pennsylvanians at risk. [**So please, sign our petition denouncing Betsy DeVos and Scott Wagner ->**](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec17e/73a2bc12/27db9568/1fce6879/626379085/VEsH/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/wagner-devos?utm_campaign=em18_180831_devos_engg_clq_act__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180831_devos_engg_clq_act__&utm_content=1+-+So+please+sign+our+petition+denouncing+B")
| [**SIGN YOUR NAME ->**](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec17e/73a2bc12/27db9568/1fce6878/626379085/VEsE/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/wagner-devos?utm_campaign=em18_180831_devos_engg_clq_act__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180831_devos_engg_clq_act__&utm_content=2+-+SIGN+YOUR+NAMEnbsprarr")
---
More Americans have raised awareness about sexual harassment and sexual assault this election year than ever before. It's a difficult conversation, and it takes a lot of hard work, but it's important to creating a safe, inclusive, and supportive society.

**[Donald Trump and Betsy DeVos are undermining those efforts.](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec17e/73a2bc12/27db9568/1fce687f/626379085/VEsF/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/wagner-devos?utm_campaign=em18_180831_devos_engg_clq_act__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180831_devos_engg_clq_act__&utm_content=3+-+Donald+Trump+and+Betsy+DeVos+are+undermi")**

I will always fight to protect survivors of sexual assault, and support policies and procedures that would stop sexual assault and harassment.

Look here, this issue is too important to stand on the sidelines. We can't let bigots like Betsy DeVos and Scott Wagner implement their dangerous agenda.

**[So I'm asking, please sign our petition denoucning Scott Wagner and Betsy DeVos:](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec17e/73a2bc12/27db9568/1fce687e/626379085/VEsC/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/wagner-devos?utm_campaign=em18_180831_devos_engg_clq_act__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180831_devos_engg_clq_act__&utm_content=4+-+So+Im+asking+please+sign+our+petition+de")**

**[https://secure.wolfforpa.com/Wagner-Devos](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec17e/73a2bc12/27db9568/1fce687d/626379085/VEsD/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/wagner-devos?utm_campaign=em18_180831_devos_engg_clq_act__&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180831_devos_engg_clq_act__&utm_content=5+-+httpssecurewolfforpacomWagnerDevos")**

Thank you,

Tom

Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
Contributions or gifts to Tom Wolf for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
If that is not your preferred email address, you can update your information [here](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec17e/73a2bc12/27db9568/1fce687c/626379085/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.wolfforpa.com/changeaddress?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em18_180831_devos_engg_clq_act__&source=em18_180831_devos_engg_clq_act__")
We believe that emails are an important way for the campaign to stay in contact with supporters like you. This campaign appreciates any feedback you might have -- positive or negative. [Click here](mailto:info@wolfforpa.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact the campaign with any questions, concerns, or ideas. [Click here](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec17e/73a2bc12/27db9568/1fce6863/626379085/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=7+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em18_180831_devos_engg_clq_act__&source=em18_180831_devos_engg_clq_act__") if you would like to unsubscribe from Tom Wolf for Governor email updates.

name: Bob Casey
subject: we can't afford to miss this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6341/51dbcc2a/1ef6003d/3a800f9/2807470054/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
It's only 67 days from Election Day, team, and this race is getting closer by the minute.

**_[Our big end-of-month fundraising deadline is _midnight tonight_ , and we're still $8,750 short of our goal. Can you rush $5 or more today to help meet it?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180831_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

This is a big deal. If we don't hit our goal this month, it will throw off our budget for the rest of the campaign. We won't be able to make new investments in our organizing programs and we'll have to consider cutting our advertising budget. With just over two months to go and so much on the line, those aren't steps I'm willing to take.

The message of this campaign is already resonating with Pennsylvanians, from folks I've met in Washington County all the way up to Lackawanna County. But we need to make sure every voter knows about this election, and we depend on grassroots support from people like you to do that. **Can you rush $5 or more today to help our message reach every corner of the Commonwealth?**

Here's the best link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/donate](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180831_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks for fighting with me,

Bob

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180831_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Fwd: 1,400 More Deaths Thanks to Trump's EPA.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Are you online? Do you have a minute?

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7829b/2f5ea88d/7620c6ed/2cbc55bb/1501578733/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/trumps-coal-plan?utm_source=ema_2018-08-31_eom-climate-kicker-nonsigner&source=ema_2018-08-31_eom-climate-kicker-nonsigner&utm_campaign=eom-climate-kicker-nonsigner&utm_medium=ema") I wouldn't bother if it wasn't important, friend. But I need you to step up. Taking action will only take a few seconds but it really matters -- join over 6,500 progressives across the country and sign our petition to oppose Trump's rollback of the Clean Power Plan now! We need your voice to make sure they hear us in the other Washington. Add your name next to mine, and let's make a difference now. We've got to act against climate change, not make it worse. | [SIGN THE PETITION »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7829b/2f5ea88d/7620c6ed/2cbc55bb/1501578733/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/trumps-coal-plan?utm_source=ema_2018-08-31_eom-climate-kicker-nonsigner&source=ema_2018-08-31_eom-climate-kicker-nonsigner&utm_campaign=eom-climate-kicker-nonsigner&utm_medium=ema")
---
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Tuesday, Aug 28, 2018
Subject: 1,400 More Deaths Thanks to Trump's EPA
Friend,
I'm sick and tired of emailing you about Trump's lack of leadership in the face of climate disasters.
But we cannot let this one fly under the radar: President Trump's plan to roll back the Clean Power Plan is an utter climate catastrophe.
Here's what's happening: President Obama's Clean Power Plan has been one of our most powerful tools to fight climate change. Trump's administration -- led by former lobbyists _for the coal companies_ \-- wants to replace it with an utter sham that flies in the face of global efforts to fight climate change.
And what's worse? Their own analysis says **1,400 additional people will die a year** as a result of the increased pollution. Thousands more -- especially kids and seniors -- will suffer from asthma and upper respiratory problems. These kids will miss tens of thousands of school days. By the EPA's own counts, this is a serious threat to the health of our families.
[**All this -- just to prop up Big Oil and Coal companies. We can't stand for this. Add your name to oppose Trump's absurd coal agenda -- and literally save lives.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7829b/2f5ea88d/7620c6ed/2cbc55bb/1501578733/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/trumps-coal-plan?utm_source=ema_2018-08-31_eom-climate-kicker-nonsigner&source=ema_2018-08-31_eom-climate-kicker-nonsigner&utm_campaign=eom-climate-kicker-nonsigner&utm_medium=ema")
[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7829b/2f5ea88d/7620c6ed/2cbc55bb/1501578733/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/trumps-coal-plan?utm_source=ema_2018-08-31_eom-climate-kicker-nonsigner&source=ema_2018-08-31_eom-climate-kicker-nonsigner&utm_campaign=eom-climate-kicker-nonsigner&utm_medium=ema")
---
Look, the government has an obligation to protect our health. There's no question about that. And when they propose policies that will instead cause harm or death to thousands of Americans, we've got to demand answers.
Trump's efforts to prop up the dying coal industry come exactly at the time we need to be transitioning to clean energy options. We've proven in Washington state that it is possible to create jobs through the clean energy economy and protect our health and environment. But his band of science deniers would rather line the pockets of their coal lobbyist friends than do what's right for the American people.
Washingtonians know how harmful climate change is to our health -- at this very moment, we're experiencing the effects of horrific wildfires, extreme heat, and historically unhealthy air quality levels. A rollback of the Clean Power Plan will do nothing to help the air we breathe and will cause deadly long-term impacts both here in Washington and around the world.
We will not stand by and allow this cynical action to threaten our state. Washington has stepped up to challenge the Trump administration's damaging and unlawful actions before -- and we will do so again, right now. [**Sign our petition to oppose Trump's coal plan, and make sure they hear our dissent in the other Washington.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7829b/2f5ea88d/7620c6ed/2cbc55bb/1501578733/VEsD/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/trumps-coal-plan?utm_source=ema_2018-08-31_eom-climate-kicker-nonsigner&source=ema_2018-08-31_eom-climate-kicker-nonsigner&utm_campaign=eom-climate-kicker-nonsigner&utm_medium=ema")
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7829b/2f5ea88d/7620c6ed/2cbc55bb/1501578733/VEsA/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/trumps-coal-plan?utm_source=ema_2018-08-31_eom-climate-kicker-nonsigner&source=ema_2018-08-31_eom-climate-kicker-nonsigner&utm_campaign=eom-climate-kicker-nonsigner&utm_medium=ema")
---

[Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7829b/2f5ea88d/7620c6ed/2cbc55ba/1501578733/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). By the EPA's own counts, this is a serious threat to the health of our families. "" "" Look, the government has an obligation to protect our health. There's no question about that. And when they propose policies that will instead cause harm or death to thousands of Americans, we've got to demand answers. Trump's efforts to prop up the dying coal industry come exactly at the time we need to be transitioning to clean energy options. We've proven in Washington state that it is possible to create jobs through the clean energy economy and protect our health and environment. But his band of science deniers would rather line the pockets of their coal lobbyist friends than do what's right for the American people. Washingtonians know how harmful climate change is to our health -- at this very moment, we're experiencing the effects of horrific wildfires, extreme heat, and historically unhealthy air quality levels. A rollback of the Clean Power Plan will do nothing to help the air we breathe and will cause deadly long-term impacts both here in Washington and around the world. We will not stand by and allow this cynical action to threaten our state. Washington has stepped up to challenge the Trump administration's damaging and unlawful actions before -- and we will do so again, right now. "" Very truly yours, Jay Inslee ""

name: Larry Cohen, Our Revolution
subject: HUGE August success for Our Revolution
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Take a look at what you've helped to accomplish this month alone:
#
Friends,
Take a look at what you've helped to accomplish this month alone:
* **Andrew Gillum shocked the establishment in Florida** , joining **Ilhan Omar** , **Rashida Tlaib** and two dozen Our Revolution candidates winning August primaries.
* **We helped defeat Right to Work in Missouri** in an overwhelming victory for working families.
* Medicare for All and free college tuition are now **supported by a majority of the American people.**
* We **ended superdelegate influence** over presidential primaries at the DNC and pushed through more critical reforms from the grassroots.

**We have the momentum. Can you pitch in today so we can keep building this political revolution with over 600 local groups across the country?**
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a976/bed43eb/799bafd9/75fca136/3471652564/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-2018?refcode=em180831")**
Local groups are the heart of our support for candidates and ballot initiatives, organizing around issues, and transforming the party. **This effort is remaking politics in our country.** We've seen extraordinary progress built upon grassroots momentum.
Our work isn't done. As we reflect on Labor Day this weekend, we renew our commitment to making even more progress by keeping up the fight through November, and **your participation is critical.** From supporting our calling and texting tools that got out the vote for our winning candidates in Florida and Arizona this week, to canvassing for Medicare for All in California, to continuing to transform the party, your contributions support a nationwide campaign that never stops.
[**Help keep this momentum going. Pitch in $5 to help us elect candidates, win progressive policies, and transform the party.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a976/bed43eb/799bafd9/75fca136/3471652564/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-2018?refcode=em180831")
Soon Congress will receive revisions to NAFTA that may well include some elements we have supported for decades. Our Revolution is one of only a few political groups that can focus on stopping corporations from dominating our economy and demanding change in our trade regime without being captive to either party.
These next few months are the most important yet. Thanks for stepping up and being a part of Our Revolution.
In solidarity,
Larry Cohen
Board Chair
Our Revolution
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a976/bed43eb/799bafd9/75fca136/3471652564/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-2018?refcode=em180831")**

PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

body:

|

| Team,

Today, the fight begins. We have just 67 days until Election Day. 67 days to knock on doors, call our neighbors, and make sure every Arizonan knows why Kyrsten Sinema is the leader we deserve in the U.S. Senate.

But to do all that, we need your help more than ever.

**[That's why we've set an ambitious goal for this grassroots team: raise $100,000 by Tuesday night.](http://act.kyrstensinema. name: Dan Lipinski
subject: this is bad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress |
body:
It’s no secret that this year alone has shown us a slew of
environmental disasters.

Even today, California and other states on the West Coast are
dealing with devastating wildfires. Many of these natural and
environmental disasters can be traced back to the loosening of
environmental regulations.

Analysis from Trump’s own administration found that with
these relaxed regulations, CO2 output could increase by 63%! This
is terrible for public health - increasing cases and severity of
asthma, cardiovascular disease and other illnesses, while also
increasing threats from heat waves, forest fires, and the other
effects of global warming will become far worse.

Enough is enough. It’s time to go all-in on the fight for
rational environmental protections, but we need YOUR HELP to do
it. Contribute right now to help us defeat the EPA rollbacks
before they can fully take effect.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Bringing #MAGA back to Indiana
body:
"We're gonna beat Joe Donnelly!" That's what I yelled back when President Donald J. Trump asked me, in front of 11,000+ cheering Hoosiers... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=1acd9bb3d6&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=012b60b4c0)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Bringing #MAGA Back to Indiana_** "We're gonna beat Joe Donnelly!"

That's what I [yelled back when President **Donald J. Trump** asked me](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=77ee8377f6&e=1acd9bb3d6), in front of 11,000+ cheering Hoosiers, how things were going in Indiana at last night's Make America Great Again Rally in Evansville. And I meant it! ([Check out this video](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fd26bd22d7&e=1acd9bb3d6) to see how excited my son was to hear the President call me out.)

What other conclusion can you come to after witnessing another capacity crowd coming out to see the President of the United States? How could you think the election will go any other way when our candidate stands with President Trump and the Democrat candidate stands with Obama/Pelosi/Schumer/Sanders? And how could you envision anything but a celebration on the first Tuesday after the first Monday in November when you feel the ENERGY, the PASSION and the EXCITEMENT in that room?

It was incredible to be a part of it and to share a few words with my fellow Hoosiers (and some #MAGA friends from Illinois and Kentucky, too!) about the importance of this election. As I said last night, when you look at all the great things President Trump has accomplished already, just think of what could be done with another reliable Republican in the U.S. Senate like **Mike Braun**.

Unlike Democrat Donnelly, Mike Braun understands that in order to Make America Great Again, we need to support the policies that Help America Build Again, Help America Create Again and Help America Grow Again! And last night, Hoosiers made it known - LOUD and CLEAR - that they agree.

-Kyle Hupfer

_(Photo: Chairman Hupfer speaks to 11,000+ Hoosiers at the Make America Great Again Rally with President Donald J. Trump in Evansville on Thursday night.)_
---
| |
---
| | **_Governor Holcomb's Week That Was_**
---
|
---
|
---
---
| **_Indiana's Highlight Reel_**
Governor **Eric Holcomb** had the opportunity last night to share what he calls "Indiana's highlight reel." It's a list of rankings and accolades that make a compelling case for responsible Republican leadership and a list that proves we are, in fact, taking Indiana to the #NextLevel.

Among the rankings Governor Holcomb mentioned:
* Indiana has a AAA credit rating and lives within its means.
* Our tax climate is ranked best in the Midwest and top 8 in the nation.
* Our regulatory climate is reasonable, rational and predictable.
* US News & World Report ranked Indiana #1 for state government efficiency.
* Debt is low, pensions are healthy and funded, and we have the second lowest cost of living in the nation.
* Per capita income growth in Indiana is five times higher than the national growth rate.

And just this week...Indiana was once again ranked in the top three freest states in the nation. No wonder President Trump said Governor Holcomb is doing a "fantastic job!"
---
|
---
| | **_The Mike Braun Corner_**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cdcb232e56&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_New Braun Ad Exposes Democrat Donnelly_**
Not only did **Mike Braun** welcome President Trump back to Indiana this week, he also launched an [extremely effective ad](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d1b5e590d2&e=1acd9bb3d6) reminding Hoosiers that 1) Joe Donnelly is a Democrat and 2) Joe Donnelly wants to raise your taxes, destroy your jobs and knock down our borders. [Check out this brand new ad](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fe58bcb409&e=1acd9bb3d6) and be sure to share it with your friends. Hoosiers need to know this!

And don't miss this [well-written op-ed](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b126e6b087&e=1acd9bb3d6) from another Trump - Donald Trump, Jr.! He joins his dad in making the case against Democrat Joe Donnelly.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Upcoming Republican Events**_
[September 8](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=67f9e231a9&e=1acd9bb3d6): Harrison County GOP Monthly Meeting
[September 12](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d4b2e4e81c&e=1acd9bb3d6): Hamilton County Republican Party Fall Dinner
[September 13](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c4e86429a9&e=1acd9bb3d6): Pike County Republican Lincoln Day Dinner with Mike Braun
[September 14](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5bda872fd2&e=1acd9bb3d6): Brown County Lincoln Day Dinner with Gov. Eric Holcomb
[September 15](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c19e71a57b&e=1acd9bb3d6): 3rd Annual Benjamin Harrison Breakfast
[September 16](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=efad2fc9a8&e=1acd9bb3d6): 7th Annual Johnson County Chair's GOP Rally & Cookout
[September 18](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=025f1758a9&e=1acd9bb3d6): Jennings County Lincoln Day Dinner
[September 21](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d60cfa59ba&e=1acd9bb3d6): Grant County Republican Golf Outing
[September 22](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3d262ca3fd&e=1acd9bb3d6): Hancock County Fall BBQ
[September 22](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dae6007b1d&e=1acd9bb3d6): Delaware County Lincoln Day Dinner

---
|
---
| _**News You Can Use**_ **Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch**[visited Fair Oaks](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1308c4d2cd&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Secretary Connie Lawson**[thanks Senator David Long for his years of service to Indiana](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d8f2b9f070&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Treasurer Kelly Mitchell**[stopped in Warsaw as she closes out her 25-county PSAP tour](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=34acbbb0de&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**Senator Todd Young **[travels to Arizona to honor the late Sen. John McCain](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=24ced2a4a3&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski**[meets with Latino entrepreneurs ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=04158c72a5&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks**[highlights work Congress has done to help veterans](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=131f5b2268&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Todd Rokita**[solicits Military Academy Nominations](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e155a66f76&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: Debbie's iPhone
subject: I'll keep this quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | This election isn't just about me at all. It is about electing Democrats up and down the ballot and a Democratic majority that will fight for Florida families and keep Donald Trump in check. With so much on the line, I have to be honest. We cannot miss our fundraising goals. [**We are close but not there yet. However, there is still time to turn this around.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f54/622b7b5b/1cbe7929/307b90d9/507327744/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180831pm?refcode=dwse180831pm_b&recurring=true&amount=5") We have until midnight to raise an additional $455. Here is a secure link you can use to rush in a contribution: [**www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/beforemidnight**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f54/622b7b5b/1cbe7929/307b90d9/507327744/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180831pm?refcode=dwse180831pm_b&recurring=true&amount=5") I'm grateful for your constant support, and please know, I am asking because this is the most critical election of our lives. Thank you, again. Debbie Sent from my iPhone
---

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: my deadline tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
I hope you will take a moment to read Rep. Joe Kennedy's message below.
| | Peter, I hope you will take a moment to read Rep. Joe Kennedy's (D-MA) message below. Rep. Kennedy is a passionate public servant who has helped lead the fight for affordable health care in Congress, and it is truly an honor to receive his support in this race. As he mentioned in his note, I have an important fundraising deadline coming up at midnight tonight, and I would sincerely appreciate [**your support**](https://act.myngp.com/el/KDUuHqVPpkaoZNru4-MOMwyB6AngpxvQE2a0NywQVPY=/oUHBYF1r0FPNXdWhTK3eIc1tBKMQPScfhj-8NGVFa80=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.31_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) to help me reach my goal. [**Peter, consider making a donation tonight, if you can -- it will make a difference.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/KDUuHqVPpkaoZNru4-MOMwyB6AngpxvQE2a0NywQVPY=/oUHBYF1r0FPNXdWhTK3eIc1tBKMQPScfhj-8NGVFa80=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.31_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thank you, \- Abigail \-----forwarded message----- From: Joe Kennedy III Sent: Aug 31, 2018, 3:09 PM Subject: we need more leaders like Abigail Friends, Congress needs more leaders who are public servants to their core. _Congress needs more leaders like Abigail Spanberger._ Abigail, a former CIA officer whose record of service stands out among candidates across the country, is running a compelling, grassroots campaign to turn a historically Republican district blue. **Her race could deliver the House majority for Democrats.** [**Join me in supporting Abigail with a donation today, before her end-of-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/KDUuHqVPpkaoZNru4-MOMwyB6AngpxvQE2a0NywQVPY=/oUHBYF1r0FPNXdWhTK3eIc1tBKMQPScfhj-8NGVFa80=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.31_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) When you look at what's wrong with Congress, it's obvious that too many of the people in power are out of touch with the basic needs of working families in this country. Last year, Republican leaders put forward a health care bill that would have taken critical protections away from millions of the most vulnerable Americans, and they took a vote without understanding its full implications. Abigail decided to run for Congress after she saw her opponent take that vote. And in the year-plus since, her grassroots campaign has inspired hundreds of Virginians to become involved in political activism for the first time. **Abigail 's race is now a toss-up, a testament to the depth of her grassroots support, and to the generosity of concerned citizens like you.** But turning her toss-up race into a win won't be easy, and Abigail is counting on you to help as she enters the critical final stretch. [**Donate now to help Abigail fight back.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/KDUuHqVPpkaoZNru4-MOMwyB6AngpxvQE2a0NywQVPY=/oUHBYF1r0FPNXdWhTK3eIc1tBKMQPScfhj-8NGVFa80=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.31_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/KDUuHqVPpkaoZNru4-MOMwyB6AngpxvQE2a0NywQVPY=/oUHBYF1r0FPNXdWhTK3eIc1tBKMQPScfhj-8NGVFa80=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.31_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/KDUuHqVPpkaoZNru4-MOMwyB6AngpxvQE2a0NywQVPY=/oUHBYF1r0FPNXdWhTK3eIc1tBKMQPScfhj-8NGVFa80=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. subject: update?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK |
body:
Friend,

We’re just hours away from our August fundraising deadline and we’re not there yet. But we’re getting close.

I’ve been talking to Steve and I promised him that we can count on our grassroots supporters to get us to our goal. I don’t want to let Steve down, and I know you don’t either.

Can you help me out by chipping in $5 or whatever you can afford before midnight? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sisolak-august-goal

Steve will be the fighter we need in Carson City, but only if we help him get there.

Thanks,

Mandi

Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.

body:
| | | | Following up on Steve's note from earlier. We just spoke, and he said we're only $2,200 away from hitting our goal.

**_[Can you help us close the gap before midnight? This is my first end-of-month deadline since Gary Johnson got in the race, and it's vital we hit this mark.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-august-deadline-2018?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+help+us+close+the+gap+before+mid&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7")_**

**Click here to donate: _[http://nm.martinheinrich.com/august-deadline](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-august-deadline-2018?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+httpnmmartinheinrichcomaugustdeadline&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7")_**

Thanks,
Martin

_Begin original message from Steve Fitzer:_

At midnight tonight, Martin faces his first end-of-month budget deadline since Libertarian Gary Johnson entered the Senate race.

**Johnson 's personal super PAC is already on the ground here in New Mexico, and Johnson just dropped six figures of his own money into his campaign.** Read more below on where we stand with our budget goal, or **_[donate here to help us hit our goal before our deadline tonight.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-august-deadline-2018?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+donate+here+to+help+us+hit+our+goal+befo&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7")_**
_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | **[Donate $10](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-august-deadline-2018?express_lane=true&amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+Donate+ask&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7")** | **[Donate $29](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-august-deadline-2018?express_lane=true&amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7")** | **[Donate $50](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-august-deadline-2018?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+Donate+ask&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7")**
---|---|---
* * *

Tonight, we face our first budget deadline since Gary Johnson entered the Senate race and turned Martin's campaign upside down.

I just went over the numbers, and we still have around $10,000 left to raise. We cannot end the month with that big of a budget gap -- missing our fundraising goal would mean we can't run the robust campaign we need to after Johnson's announcement.

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_
**[Donate $10](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-august-deadline-2018?express_lane=true&amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=7+-+Donate+ask&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7")** | **[Donate $29](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-august-deadline-2018?express_lane=true&amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=8+-+Donate+ask&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7")** | **[Donate $50](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-august-deadline-2018?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=9+-+Donate+ask&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7")**
---|---|---

In response to Johnson's last minute campaign, we released two television ads in the past month, and we're expanding our on-the-ground presence so we can talk to even more voters. Our growing campaign means an ever-increasing budget, however, and that's why I am asking for your help today.

**Martin isn 't relying on shadowy super PACs like Johnson is -- he believes in the power of grassroots supporters like you. Can you help us close our budget gap before midnight so we have what it takes to defeat Gary Johnson?**

**_[Contribute here before midnight so we can re-elect Martin in a critical year for Senate Democrats->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-august-deadline-2018?amount=50&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=10+-+Contribute+here+before+midnight+so+we+ca&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7")_**
_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_
**[Donate $10 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. ****[Donate $50 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. **[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-august-deadline-2018?amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=14+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180831_2_7")**

subject: President Trump and our August goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|

| | **Today, President Trump was in town campaigning for Rep. Ted Budd.** [**But in my eyes, this was just a distraction from today 's most important task: Hitting our August goal.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279ed/e3b7d3/5d9fb389/25553129/3272187069/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180831pm?refcode=kme180831pm_m&recurring=true") We only have until midnight tonight. That gives us another 6 hours to raise $500 and reach our $45,000 goal. [**If you can, get your contribution in RIGHT NOW.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279ed/e3b7d3/5d9fb389/25553129/3272187069/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180831pm?refcode=kme180831pm_m&recurring=true") Thanks!
Tori Tori Taylor

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: please read
body:
|
---

| | | Hi - I know my team emailed you this morning, but I wanted to reach out one more time, personally, before our midnight deadline. The stakes are high in this election. So many families are counting on us to win so Brian Kemp's regressive vision for Georgia doesn't become our reality. We have a plan to reach out to every single Georgian before November, because everyone needs to know how important it is to cast a ballot. But we need your help to get this done. Will you chip in $3 before our midnight deadline? **[www.StaceyAbrams.com/AugustDeadline](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa992/34a064cc/dc40e9a/70e3c47/3258677113/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODMxMTgtMi1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE083118-2-full-link1")** - Stacey
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa992/34a064cc/dc40e9a/70e3c44/3258677113/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODMxMTgtMi1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE083118-2-full-button")**

1270 Caroline Street

Atlanta, GA 30307

name: Bob Menendez
subject: We can make New Jersey even better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

I wanted to reach out one last time and make sure you understand how important this race is to me.

I know we have more work to do to make our state and country better for everyone. But with Trump in the Oval Office, that job is substantially harder. And Bob Hugin wants to help Trump by buying this U.S. Senate seat.

[**We only have a few hours before our August deadline strikes and I refuse to give up. Can I count on your support before midnight? It honestly has never mattered more.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cb5/3af3c5d/3a959c79/4ec3c0a8/1831658690/VEsH/ [](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6345/51dbcc2a/1ee52c2a/3a87d2a/1542457705/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") BREAKING NEWS, you can't miss this:

Today the NRA's lobbying arm published a new blog post supporting Republican Senate candidates, including Bob's opponent, Congressman Lou Barletta. The NRA is _terrified_ that Democrats will take back the Senate in November, and they're going to do whatever it takes to stand in our way.

**_[Give the NRA something to worry about: chip in $5 to Bob Casey before his end-of-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight.](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180831_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Earlier this year, President Trump attacked Bob at an NRA rally because Bob refuses to support some of the most dangerous and divisive pieces of the Trump agenda. The NRA hates that Bob supports popular, commonsense solutions for keeping our communities safe, and now they're throwing their weight behind Bob's opponent.

The NRA is powerful, so we can't take this lightly. Bob needs to raise another $4,100 by midnight tonight to stay on track to win, and now that the NRA is on the attack, we absolutely cannot afford to miss this goal.

**Re-electing Bob Casey to the Senate with a Democratic majority is the NRA's worst nightmare. Let's make it happen. name: Tina Smith
subject: last update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Polls tightening and the latest Cook Political Report rating moving toward Republicans.

| We can't afford to come up short of this goal before our deadline at midnight, friend. Republican special interests are preparing to spend record sums of money to strengthen their Senate majority -- and you can bet they are drawing a target around Minnesota. They have seen the polls tightening and the latest Cook Political Report rating moving toward Republicans. **If we can 't respond to _every_ attack over the next 67 days, we could lose this race. And if we do, we will lose any chance of taking back the Senate and stopping Trump's agenda.** **There is just too much at stake to leave anything to chance.[Make a contribution of $10 before our deadline at midnight. We must hit our August goal to take on the millions in attacks we'll face and we're still $3,698 short:](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4ac22/c1f7015/6de6286b/1141f75c/3837093430/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180831PM_em-full&recurring=auto")** **[Contribute](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4ac22/c1f7015/6de6286b/1141f75c/3837093430/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180831PM_em-full&recurring=auto")** A lifetime appointment on the Supreme Court. Health care coverage for people with pre-existing conditions. Attacks on our democracy. The effects of this election will be felt for generations. **Friend, are you ready to give it all you have so we can win it?** **[Make a contribution now so we can hit this goal and ensure we stop Republicans from turning this seat red.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4ac22/c1f7015/6de6286b/1141f75c/3837093430/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180831PM_em-full&recurring=auto")** Thank you for everything you are doing, Tina Smith

name: Claire McCaskill
subject: can't stress this enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catherine Cortez Masto for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friends - Senator Catherine Cortez Masto said I could reach out because our Senate race in Missouri is in a **_DEAD HEAT_** , according to a new Emerson College poll. Here's what you need to know:
* Right-wing groups have already launched **over a dozen** ad buys against me, and more are coming.
* **Every** dollar from grassroots supporters like you will make a difference in a race this tough.
* We need to raise **$16,000 by midnight **to stay on track to hit our monthly goal.

I'm fighting with everything I've got, every single day, against the most reckless parts of President Trump's agenda. But there's so much at stake - and right now, we're falling short of what we need to win. **I can't do this without you:** **Can you give $5 or more right now to protect Missouri's Democratic Senate seat?**

Here's what you need to know: Right-wing groups have already launched over a dozen ad buys against me, and more are coming. Every dollar from grassroots supporters like you will make a difference in a race this tough. We need to raise $16,000 by midnight to stay on track to hit our monthly goal. I'm fighting with everything I've got, every single day, against the most reckless parts of President Trump's agenda. name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: Our deadline is just hours away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
Hey there, Peter. Our final fundraising deadline before the primary is just hours away, so I wanted to send you a brief update and make one last ask before midnight.
I set a big goal for our team for this deadline, and we've almost reached it. We're so close that, if you make your first online donation right now, you could be the one that pushes us over the top.
Here's the link:
**[https://go.zephyrforny.com/deadline](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780915/6e822e2f/1a82424d/4173adc8/2953596613/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MzEtMy1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-primary-deadline?refcode=em180831-3-full")**
We're in the final stretch of this primary, and I'm so proud of all that we have accomplished so far. We cannot let up now.
Momentum is on our side, but there are powerful people and wealthy interests who are likely to spend unlimited sums at the last minute to stop us. If we're in this together though, we can beat them.
Thanks for all you do,
Zephyr
[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780915/6e822e2f/1a82424d/4173adc8/2953596613/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MzEtMy1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-primary-deadline?refcode=em180831-3-full")

* * *
